headline: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Declares Cash Dividend of $0.72 per Common Share for 1Q26
summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) today announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.72 per common share for the first quarter of 2026. The dividend is payable on April 15, 2026 to stockholders of record on March 31, 2026.
